summary: Recent changes in the Gecko Media Plugins area of Firefox involve the implementation of **HashBytes**, a technology used for creating quick and secure hashes of thin strings of data. This enhancement improves the efficiency of how the browser handles media-related tasks, such as verifying media integrity and security. By ensuring faster and more reliable string hashing, users can expect a smoother experience when streaming or interacting with media content, leading to better overall performance._Note that this update does not make visible changes to the user interface or experience._
